name: Ring of Coconut Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup hot water or hot coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease and lightly flour a 10-inch tube or bundt pan.
2. Prepare the filling; set aside.
- To measure flour, lightly spoon it into a measuring cup and level off.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, oil, and eggs. Beat for 1 minute at high speed.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except for the filling and nuts, beating for 3 minutes at medium speed while scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in the nuts by hand.
6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Carefully spoon the prepared filling over the batter.
8. Top with the remaining batter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 70 to 75 minutes, or until the top springs back lightly when touched in the center.
10. Cool upright in the pan for 15 minutes; then remove from the pan.
11. Cool completely before drizzling with a glaze made by combining 1 cup powdered sugar, 3 tablespoons cocoa, 2 tablespoons butter, 2 teaspoons vanilla, and 1 to 3 tablespoons hot water.
